reviews.review_title: Good , but need to have more options
reviews.review_description: First, thank you developer for this fun game, enjoyed the mix reality gameplay.  Suggestions to able to save , edit, open the finished creation.  Allow to have many save of the works.   Allow to resize each shape to smaller or bigger if possible.  Thank you

developer_response.body:
Hi Bryanlo, 
Thank you so much for your review!!!

It is really helpful for us. And yes, we are working in adding all those features + new environment for the full immersion option. 

Kind regards
Forms

reviews.review_description: Immersive and polished, this VR game offers a relaxing creative experience. Crafting different forms in the stylish room with soothing music is a great way to decompress. The passthrough option adds a nice touch. Though the options are limited, I trust the developers will expand the game. Excited to see its growth!
